AS A RESULT OF HEAVY SUSTAINED RAINFALL AND HAIL WEST AND WNW OF ARCO FROM 2 TO 4 PM TODAY, THE RAINFAL AND MELTING HAIL HAVE NOW REACHED HWY 20/26/93. THE FLOODING IS ABOUT TO CROSS OVER THIS HIGHWAY FROM MILE MARKERS 241 TO 243. MINOR RESIDENTIAL FLOODING HAS OCCURRED WITH FLOODING INTO THE HOSPITAL. ALL THIS WATER IS COMING OUT OF ROCK CANYON NOW THAT ALL THE FARMERS CANALS ARE COMPLETELY FULL. A CITY BRIDGE ON ERA STREET HAS WASHED OUT AND THE STREET IS NOW CLOSED. MINOR FLOODING ON HWY 33.

FLOODING FROM GROUSE NOW REACHING THE BASE OF THE MOUNTAINS AND SHOULD CROSS HWY 93,OR ANTELOPE ROAD. FLOOD WATER DEPTH ON ROAD FLOWING 1 TO 2 INCHES DEEP WITH GOLF-BALL SIZE HAIL FLOATING DOWN THE ROAD.
